skill_availability_goal: Verify confirmed feature synchronization creates a database/schema/domain/entity subtree plus a two-domain Design hierarchy with reciprocal links and authority boundaries, while preserving and refreshing the stable flat database path.
prompt: 按 `pm-handoff.md`、`candidate-scope-confirmation.md` 和 `design-scope-confirmation.md` 已确认的 feature delivery 范围执行 `workspace-access` 的 database + design 正式文档同步。保留并刷新现有稳定 `database/workspace-access.md`，生成 `database/primary/workspace-access/` 完整子树；逐页核验 design closeout，生成完整系统/领域索引、组件、跨组件流程和授权边界页，链接 API/Database 权威页而不复制 contract；原子更新页面、导航和 change map，执行宿主 `npm run test:docs`、public/internal build，再输出 #117 handoff。
